# cloudflareext_secrets_store (Data Source)

Reads a Cloudflare Secrets Store by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudflareext_secrets_store" "example" {
  name = "my-secret-store"
}

output "store_id" {
  value = data.cloudflareext_secrets_store.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the store to look up.

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) The creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the store.
- `modified` (String) The last modification timestamp.
